landing.title: One Account. Absolute Synchrony.
landing.subtitle: Welcome to Bamboo Ecosystem's unified identity and browser synchronization platform. Securely synchronize your passwords, settings, bookmarks, and open tabs across all your devices.
landing.intro_desc: Your unified gateway to all services, developer modules, and browser customizations in the Bamboo Ecosystem. One credential keeps you in perfect alignment.
landing.sync_desc: No matter if you transition from your workstation, mobile phone, or secondary laptop — your environment, custom tabs, bookmarks, and sessions follow you instantaneously.
landing.features_subtitle: Highly scalable specifications structured to protect, preserve, and accelerate your browsing lifestyle.
landing.feat_security_desc: Fortified with end-to-end encryption, regular active session audits, and robust OAuth bindings.
landing.feat_speed_desc: State synchronization is compressed and pushed via reactive peer-to-peer protocols instantly.
landing.feat_privacy_desc: Your bookmarks and sync payloads are encrypted client-side. We never sell your browsing behaviors.
landing.feat_auth_desc: Access safely with secure passkeys, credentials, or verified third-party Google connections.
landing.devices_sync_desc: Activate, track, and selectively sign-out browser clients from a single command deck. Keep your session space secure.
landing.security_card_desc: Review precise hardware, geographic browser footprints, and suspend unauthorized logins on the fly.
landing.isolation_desc: Instantly terminate all other authentications from any active browser environment.
landing.footer_text: © 2026 Bamboo Ecosystem. All rights reserved. Devised for seamless performance and privacy.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Access your Bamboo Account deck
login.errorGeneric: Invalid credentials or communication failure. Please verify and try again.

register.title: Create Bamboo Account
register.subtitle: Join the next generation secure synchrony
register.errorGeneric: Registration failed. Email might already be taken.

cards.devicesDesc: View, manage, and log out active hardware devices running Bamboo browser logs.
cards.syncDesc: Adjust which bookmarks, preferences, and lists synchronize seamlessly in the cloud.
cards.securityDesc: Audit active auth sessions, review login history, and update passkeys.
cards.settingsDesc: Customize profile details, change display language, and export core raw dashboard data.

devices.title: Device Deck
devices.subtitle: Review active hardware endpoints synchronizing with your profile.

sync.title: Synchrony Parameters
sync.subtitle: Decide what details transfer across your active browser workspaces.
sync.syncSuccess: Successfully synchronized state with cloud node.

security.title: Security & Sessions
security.subtitle: Audit your active tokens, review structural footprints, and adjust credentials.
security.logoutAllDesc: This will revoke all active browser tokens and session states across all external clients.
security.googleConnected: Google Account Link is currently active.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.subtitle: Adjust primary metrics, linguistic formats, and data controls.
settings.deleteConfirm: Warning: This action is permanent and deletes all browser sync items, passwords, and devices.
